description: edit an existing image with a text instruction via an OpenRouter image model
rules: read-only — only requests a render, mutates no remote/live service
requires OPENROUTER_API_KEY and network access to openrouter.ai
INPUT_IMAGE is encoded as base64 and sent with the editing PROMPT (enables edit mode)
supported input formats: PNG, JPEG, GIF, WebP
edited PNG is written under record_store (the input image is not modified in place)
usage: Set PROMPT (editing instruction) and INPUT_IMAGE (path to the source image). Optional: MODEL, OUTPUT_NAME. Set OPENROUTER_API_KEY. Output: the named PNG under record_store.
limitation: Network + valid OpenRouter API key required to actually render. Offline or without a key, the porter still produces the output file so the contract holds, but it will be empty/placeholder. Only gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview and flux.2-pro support editing.
